[Pick Up Recruitment Preview]

A new Unique Pick Up Recruitment will begin on 8/9 (Tue)!
Target Pick Up Student: 3★ Mutsuki (New Year)

Unique Pick Up Recruitment Period: 8/9 (Tue) After Maintenance – 8/23 (Tue) 03:00 (UTC) Before Maintenance![xoFmxDQOjjYyt8lbPjtegE4FNGMxCnUO.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/1348/xoFmxDQOjjYyt8lbPjtegE4FNGMxCnUO.jpg)
